author: benjaminezequiel
description: Turns out watching your word count go up is all the motivation you need.

manifest.description: Visualize and track your writing habit!

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Adds a cache to Whole Voult word and chars counts (thanks @ccmdi!)
- Automatically deletes backups older than 14 days (if there are more than 4 backups saved, this will later be all configurable)
- Fixes files that dont match the currentActivity not displaying their word and char counts (@ccmdi)

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Fixes non-markdown modifications being tracked on word counting;

**Thanks to @danieltomasz for the fix!**

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Adds an option to choose the amount of weeks on embedded heatmaps
- Sorts items on Entries widget based on unit count (chars/words)
releases.name: v0.2.3

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- **Entries** section now displays every activity registered for that day
This helps users exit possible invalid states and solve sync issues, like duplicated activities.
To completely solve this with any syncing workflow, there needs to be a "input manual activity" feature.

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
> [!CAUTION]  
> This is a beta version intended for testing! **Make sure to backup your data before trying it**. (just save your data.json somewhere else)
> This version should also preferably be manual installed (by changing the main.js and styles.css with new ones), using BRAT could delete your data.json (which includes all your data!)

---

Hi! This release is intended for people who want to test the new major version of the plugin, which includes a lot of new functionality. If you have any feedback or found a bug, please feel free to create an issue! I hope you are enjoying the plugin.
Benjamin.

---

## Writing Goal
- You can now define an amount of words you want to write per day as a goal, KTR will track your streak!

## Heatmap
New customization options!
- Change the heatmap coloring method (gradual, solid, stops, liquid)
  - Stops: Discrete color levels (low/medium/high thresholds)
  - Gradual: Smooth gradient between colors
  - Solid: Single color intensity
  - Liquid: Color "fill the cell" from the bottom up

- Heatmap cells are rounded by default, but can be changed to squared in the settings.
- You can now click on the heatmap to be taken to the daily note from that day, if it exists!
 
## Slots
There are a lot of new data points you can check in the sidebar, in each slot you can click the "Change Type" button to toggle between them. Is also possible to change the unit from WORDS to CHARS. More slots can be added on the sidebar, up to then!

## Entries
Beyond also toggling between character and word counts, you can also use the entries as navigation links for each note!

## New code blocks
- The code blocks syntax changed a bit, it's now separated in three different code blocks:

#### `ktr-heatmap`
- Embeddable heatmaps with query options
Example: Use `filePath starts_with "journal"` to filter that folder!
The only target available right now is the filePath (I might add properties in the future).
The only operation right now is "starts_with" because of performance issues, but I'll try to add `contains`!

- Queries are now composable!
Example: `(filePath starts_with "journal") OR (filePath starts_with "worldbuilding")`
Different operations must always be separated with parenthesis.

- Options for each heatmap:
You can pass a set of options to customize a heatmap instance:
```js
OPTIONS                                    // must always start with the OPTIONS header
HIDE month_labels, weekday_labels          // allows to hide the labels
COLORING_MODE liquid                       // toggles the coloring mode (liquid, stops, solid or gradual)
STOPS 100, 500, 1000                       // changes the keypoints used for calculating the color of the cells
SQUARED_CELLS                              // changes the cell styling for a more squared look
ROUNDED_CELLS                              // changes the cell styling for a rounded look
```

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a01c1aef-c740-4aae-b5a2-cd5d74bbb3ad)

#### `ktr-slots`
Allows you to inline custom data display slots! There are several available slots:

- CURRENT_FILE: displays the current file count;
- CURRENT_STREAK: displays the amount of sequential days where writing goal was completed;
- CURRENT_DAY: displays the amount written from the start of the day until now;
- CURRENT_WEEK: displays the amount from the start of the week (currently defined as monday, I'll add a setting soon);
- CURRENT_MONTH: displays the amount from the start of the month;
- CURRENT_YEAR: displays the amount from the start of the year;
- LAST_DAY: amount written in the last 24 hours;
- LAST_WEEK: amount written in the last 7 days;
- LAST_MONTH: amount written in the last 30 days;
- LAST_YEAR: amount written in the last 365 days;
- WHOLE_VAULT: amount written in every markdown file in the vault

To use this slots, you can just list the ones you want in order. You can specify if you want WORDS/CHARS and the total or average for that period!

Example:
```ktr-slots
CURRENT_WEEK, WORDS
CURRENT_DAY, CHARS
CURRENT_STREAK
WHOLE_VAULT
CURRENT_MONTH, WORDS, AVG
CURRENT_YEAR
```

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/c51988f4-c82d-4be8-9b38-a098b097534b)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/64466db3-b8aa-4c9b-b020-dd7b99f9a412)



#### `ktr-entries`
Allows you to see what you did in a specific day, just like the sidebar shows today's entries.
Simple widget that displays the activity of a specific date, by default it shows the current date.
You can pass it a date by just writing it inside the block using YYYY-MM-DD format!

Example:

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/8a67e1d0-1680-4196-adde-de23f3a7622d)
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/de8310fd-f26e-40d6-9c79-5e2410a732c7)

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description: Fixes #19 and #18.

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Allows for multiple filters of the same time #15 
- Includes new negative filter ("PATH does not include X") #13 
- Adds animation to the delete button
- Shows only the file name on daily entries (will become a user setting eventually)

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description: - Fix #14

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Adds TODAY ENTRIES view, allowing to inspect and delete files tracked in the current day
- Adds toggles to hide heatmap and/or today entries through settings
- Fixes bug where files where not properly filtered by queries #8 
- Adds queries to hide sections in custom code blocks
- Multiple minor visual adjustments

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Allows to query the custom code block to filter data that includes a specific path.

Usage:
```keep-the-rhythm
PATH includes "daily" // will only count data from files that include this in their paths or names
```

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description: - Creates a custom code block that allows user to embed the heatmap view inside any file (but there isn't any functionality to filter and query the plugin yet, solves #5 );

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Includes characters from multiple scripts to the word counting engine (turned off by default, can be turned on through an option on the plugin settings, solves #6 );
- Adds a test suite to check if word counting functionality is consistent with general heuristics;

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description: - Solve bug where new devices were not being properly initialized

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Fix #3 and #1
- Adds option to recover data from previous versions #2
- Remove sentence case from configs

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Change data structure to use data.json instead of specific files
- Change settings content to use sentence case
- Add syncronization tool that merges filles when synced
- Optimize plugin file size

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description: FIX: Remove unnecessary logs.

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- FEATURE: Added custom command to open the heatmap
- FIX: Solves missalignment between dates and their respective labels
- FIX: Data tracking was using UTC rather than local timezone

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
- Change target directory for device data
The whole point of creating this plugin was to be able to sync that information across devices, without running on problems involving files being overwritten. To do that, the files with the device data need to be inside `.obsidian`, instead of the default plugins folder.

releases.author: benjaminezequiel
releases.description:
## 0.0.1 | 26-12-2024

First alpha release of Keep the Rhythm!

![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/daa0f834-a5a7-47e5-8361-58e5e7c11405)

### Features
- Daily word count tracking across your vault
- Interactive heatmap visualization of writing activity
- Hover tooltips showing exact word counts per day
- Basic statistics including:
- Color customization for heatmap
- Adjustable ranges for heatmap intensity
